query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS house_ledgers (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  house_id INT NOT NULL,
  ledger_name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  ledger_type ENUM('house', 'root', 'bloodline', 'mirrored', 'adaptive') DEFAULT 'house',
  balance DECIMAL(15,2) DEFAULT 0,
  total_income DECIMAL(15,2) DEFAULT 0,
  total_distributions DECIMAL(15,2) DEFAULT 0,
  total_treasury_contributions DECIMAL(15,2) DEFAULT 0,
  currency VARCHAR(10) DEFAULT 'USD',
  is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);
command:

  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  house_id INT NOT NULL,
  ledger_name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  ledger_type ENUM('house', 'root', 'bloodline', 'mirrored', 'adaptive') DEFAULT 'house',
  balance DECIMAL(15,2) DEFAULT 0,

  currency VARCHAR(10) DEFAULT 'USD',
  is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
